caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is seated in a recording studio, positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a boom arm. He wears over-ear headphones and a dark zip-up jacket over a grey shirt. Behind him is a wall of dark grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. As the scene progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expressions and moving his head slightly. He gestures with his hands, which are partially visible at the edges of the frame, emphasizing his points. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium close-up shot focused on the man's face and the microphone. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the footage.
